text:
Olympic gold medalist Arshad Nadeem was gifted a buffalo by his father-in-law, who valued this traditional offering. Nadeem humorously expressed that he had hoped for land instead, but appreciated the gesture. The athlete, residing with his family in Punjab, remains closely tied to his rural roots despite his international success.

title: Watch Arshad Nadeem's hilarious reply on getting buffalo from father-in-law after winning Olympic javelin gold medal for Pakistan - The Economic Times
description: Olympic gold medalist Arshad Nadeem was gifted a buffalo by his father-in-law, who valued this traditional offering. Nadeem humorously expressed that he had hoped for land instead, but appreciated the gesture. The athlete, residing with his family in Punjab, remains closely tied to his rural roots despite his international success.
